Program_Info.Program_Change_Info: Added Windows Defender status retrieval and minor bug fixes.

English.Char_Desc_45: Simple portable PC system info tool.
English.Char_Desc_80: View basic PC specs with ease. Portable, no installation required.
English.Char_Desc_250: Ohnuki-san Lite is a streamlined, portable utility for quick PC information checks. It provides essential system info with the same sophisticated interface as the Plus version. No installation required and completely free to use.
English.Char_Desc_450: Ohnuki-san Lite is a free, portable system utility for users who need essential PC information at a glance. It offers core system info in a lightweight package that runs without installation. For more detailed hardware information, please consider Ohnuki-san Plus.
English.Char_Desc_2000:
Check your basic PC system information at a glance. Ohnuki-san Lite is a free, smart utility designed for simplicity and style.
Key features: - No Installation Required: A standalone portable utility. Just run the executable to see your system specs instantly. - Sleek Interface: View essential system information display in a user-friendly UI.
Lite vs Plus: - Ohnuki-san Lite: Essential system information for free (Portable). - Ohnuki-san Plus: More detailed hardware information in a paid version (Portable).
Developed by chilili kobo, this tool provides a clean and efficient experience for checking your system specs.
